commercial_benchmark._MANDATORY: Every upgrade MUST be measured against COMMERCIAL_BENCHMARK.md. If it does not shrink a gap below, it is cosmetic.
commercial_benchmark.fundamental_blocker: RESOLVED (SESSION-028+SUPP): Physics engine, cognitive motion, foot contact detection, IK foot locking, skating cleanup all delivered. Next blocker: FABRIK IK procedural gait and architecture integration (WFC/shader/export).

strategic_paths.path_a_physics_motion_engine: SUBSTANTIALLY DELIVERED (SESSION-028+SUPP): AnglePoseProjector + PositionPhysicsProjector + cognitive motion + physics penalty + ContactDetector + FootLockingConstraint + ConstraintBlender + PhysDiffProjectionScheduler. Remaining: full FABRIK chain procedural gait.
strategic_paths.path_b_ai_visual_polish: Use math motion data as ControlNet input for AI diffusion models to guarantee 'looks beautiful' (Mid-term)
strategic_paths.path_c_architecture_closure: Integrate WFC, Export, and Shader modules into the main pipeline (Parallel)

current_focus: SESSION-028-SUPP closed the PhysDiff alignment gaps: ContactDetector (height+velocity heuristic), FootLockingConstraint (analytical 2-bone IK), ConstraintBlender (Hermite smoothstep transitions), PhysDiffProjectionScheduler (late-biased selective projection), and enhanced compute_physics_penalty() with skating/penetrate/float terms. AnglePoseProjector.step() now auto-applies the full contact→blend→IK pipeline when skeleton_ref is provided. Pipeline passes skeleton to projector. 36 new tests, 596/596 pass. Next: full FABRIK chain procedural gait (P0-MOTION-3), architecture integration (WFC/shader/export), production benchmarks.

trigger_when: The user explicitly asks for precise, parallel, global, or comprehensive research
A subsystem upgrade is blocked by missing external knowledge
The session risks becoming superficial, repetitive, or formal without new ideas
A multi-session gap needs stronger benchmarks, implementation references, or production standards

explicit_trigger_phrases.standard: 启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.gap_focused: 围绕当前最大差距做去重并行搜索
explicit_trigger_phrases.feature_focused: 针对这个功能做精准并行参考全网信息
explicit_trigger_phrases.anti_drift: 如果你判断当前升级可能流于形式，立即启动研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.research_first: 先按研究协议补足参考，再开始实现
explicit_trigger_phrases.dedup_focused: 按去重机制并行搜索，不要重复已有资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.landing_focused: 只收集能直接指导项目落地实现的资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.soft_trigger: 优先启用精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.hard_trigger: 本轮禁止直接开做，必须先启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.deep_reading: 这篇论文/这个仓库是指路明灯，认真研读每一个细节
explicit_trigger_phrases.full_standard_command: 启动精准并行研究协议：围绕当前差距做去重并行搜索，只保留能直接指导 MarioTrickster-MathArt 落地升级的高价值资料。

research_trigger_policy.deep_reading_trigger_rule: When the user names a specific paper, repo, or documentation as the primary reference (e.g., 'this paper is your guiding light'), MUST switch from parallel scanning to Deep Reading Protocol. Parallel discovery finds WHAT to build; Deep Reading finds HOW to build it. Never skip Deep Reading for North Star sources.
research_trigger_policy.phrase_interpretation_rule: Close paraphrases should count as valid triggers when the intent is clearly precise, parallel, dedup-aware, implementation-relevant research.
stop_when: Two or more strong sources support the same practical conclusion
New results are mostly duplicates or weaker restatements
The next code change is already clear
The bottleneck is engineering rather than missing knowledge

recent_audit.summary: SESSION-028-SUPP closed the PhysDiff alignment gaps identified by rigorous paper audit. The physics engine now includes foot contact detection, IK foot locking, constraint blending, selective projection scheduling, and skating/penetration/float penalty terms. Animation physics realism gap reduced from 5% to 3%. The remaining top gaps are full FABRIK chain procedural gait, architecture integration, production benchmarks, and visual quality.
